warm-milk-punch.name: Warm Milk Punch

ingredients.item: -ml bottle pierre ferrand 1840 cognac or other full-bodied cognac
El dorado 5-year-old rum or other dark rum

instructions: Using a wooden spoon, muddle lemon zest and sugar in a medium bowl until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Cover and let sit at least 3 hours and up to 12 hours (longer is better). At this point sugar should be dissolved, leaving a lemon-flavored syrup.

Combine lemon syrup, lemon juice, demerara syrup, Cognac, and rum in a large pitcher. Bring milk to a bare simmer in a medium saucepan. Immediately pour milk into Cognac mixture (milk will curdle right away). Cover and chill at least 1 hour and up to 24 hours.
Strain mixture through a fine-mesh sieve lined with cheesecloth into a large bowl. Cover and chill until cold (any remaining curds should settle at the bottom of the pitcher).
Carefully ladle clarified punch into a clean pitcher, leaving any remaining curds behind. Chill until ready to serve. Reheat gently just before serving and divide among teacups.
Punch base can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled.

waterfall-cake-lezzet.name: Waterfall Cake
instructions: 1. Practical cake recipes include a special place.
2. Set oven to 200 degrees.
3. Melt the chocolate and butter in sauce pan.
4. Mix and mix flour, dust, salt and eggs with mixer.
5. Oil cream caramel dies.
6. Share chocolate mixture into moulds.
7. Bake 7-8 minutes in the oven.
8. Transfer moulds into the tab and reversed cakes.
9. Serve hot with vanilla ice cream according to your desire.

watermelon-cocktail-summer-tonic-argiro.name: Watermelon Cocktail (summer Tonic)

ingredients.item: Drying of white wine (or apple vinegar or rice vinegar)
30 mlchery blossom tonic (or simple tonic, or soda, or pink grapefruit soda)
Drying of white wine (or apple vinegar or rice vinegar)
30 mlchery blossom tonic (or simple tonic, or soda, or pink grapefruit soda)

instructions: The alcoholic basis for this cocktail is vodka, which we have perfumed with raspberries, strawberries and basil leaves. It also contains lychee liqueur, shrub of fresh watermelon, fresh watermelon juice and cherry blossom flavoured tonic.
In a sterile container that closes airtightly we put the vodka, raspberries, strawberries cut in half, cleaned from their stems and basil leaves.
Store in a cool and shady place for three to four days and shake daily.
On the fourth day we open it, drain and store it in a clean sterile bottle or container in the refrigerator.

watermelonancho-chile-salsa.name: Watermelon–ancho Chile Salsa
instructions: Bring chiles and 2 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan. Remove from heat, cover, and let sit until chiles soften, 25–30 minutes. Transfer chiles to a blender with a slotted spoon; discard liquid. Add watermelon, tomato, onion, jalapeño, garlic, and lime juice and blend until smooth; season with salt. Cover and chill.
Do Ahead: Salsa can be made 8 hours ahead. Keep chilled.

wedding-chicken.name: Wedding Chicken
instructions: Whisk garlic, chiles, ginger, oil, soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, fish sauce, and salt in a medium bowl until sugar and salt dissolve. Add lemon slices and thyme. Place marinade and chicken in a large resealable plastic bag. Turn to coat, and chill at least 12 hours.

Heat oven to 450°. Remove chicken from marinade, shaking off excess, and place, skin side up, on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast until cooked through and an instant-read thermometer inserted in the thickest part of the thigh registers 165°, 25–30 minutes. Serve chicken with lemon wedges for squeezing over.
DO AHEAD: Chicken can be marinated 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.

weeknight-chicken-tortilla-soup.name: Weeknight Chicken Tortilla Soup

ingredients.prep: to taste - can substitute dried cilantro
diced - can substitute 1 tbsp of dried onion
or kidney beans (can substitute black beans)

instructions: Boil water in a crockpot. Once boiling, add bouillon cubes and stir until dissolved.
Once dissolved, add remaining ingredients except chicken. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add chicken and simmer for 5 more minutes.
Serve warm with toppings.

western-rubble-soup-teleculinaria.name: Western Rubble Soup
instructions: Bring a pot to the fire with the bone and garlic peeled. Cover with water and let cook for about an hour.
Wash the cabbage and cut it in julian; peel and cut the pumpkin, onion, carrot, potato and turnip into small pieces (reserve some potato, turnip and carrot for the garrison).

Take another pot to the fire with the water. When boiling, add the carrot, onion and pumpkin and cook for 7 to 10 minutes. In the end, crush very well with the magic wand. Add the cabbage and vegetables to the trim and let them cook for 8 minutes until they are tender.

Eliminate the bone, pass your broth through a strainer and add it to the soup until it has the desired texture. Add the beans, season with salt, olive oil and chopped parsley and stir. Retrieve the spices, remove from the fire and serve the soup very hot.

white-chocolate-snack-mix.name: White Chocolate Snack Mix
instructions: Line 3 baking sheets with waxed paper or parchment. Set aside.
In a large bowl, combine mini pretzels, toasted oat cereal, crispy corn cereal squares, salted peanuts, and candy-coated chocolate pieces. Set aside.
In a microwave-safe bowl, heat chips and oil on medium-high for 2 minutes, stirring once. Microwave on high for 10 seconds; stir until smooth. Pour over cereal mixture and mix well.
Spread onto prepared baking sheets. Cool; break apart. Store in an airtight container.

white-lentils-argiro.name: White Lentils

ingredients.item: 1 red sweet potato cut into frame
1 red sweet potato cut into frame

instructions: Soak the wheat from the previous night in a bowl with plenty of water. Alternatively, you can use thick oatmeal that boils faster.
Boil the lentils for 5’ and disccard the water. We drag them.
Clean the sweet potato and cut it into small frames.
Heat 2 tabletspoons of olive oil in medium pot and sauce the onions and leek for 3-4’.
Add the garlic and sauté for a minute.
Then, add the lentils and wheat, carrot and sweet potato and mix.
Add hot water to cover the lentils (or broth), the bay leaf and the cumin.
Simmer the lentils until they soften and melt and stay with some soup.
Towards the end of the boiling seasoning, pepper.
When the lentils soften and the wheat is poured, add the remaining olive oil and mix the food vigorously.
Finally, drop the dry mint and turn off the lentils.
Add a few drops of wine vinegar.
Let the food stand for 10’.
Serve in deep dishes the grated white lentils, with the incredible aromas and unique taste.

whole-grain-pancakes.name: Whole Grain Pancakes

ingredients.prep: such as barley, farro, rye, spelt, kamut, and/or quinoa

ingredients.item: Sliced peaches or other stone fruit and pure maple syrup

instructions: Whisk flours, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl. Whisk egg and buttermilk in a medium bowl. Using a few swift strokes, whisk egg mixture into dry ingredients until combined. Stir in grains (note: you can pulse the grains in a food processor if you’d prefer them in smaller pieces).

Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Lightly brush with butter. Add half of batter to skillet, spreading into an even layer as wide as the skillet. Cook pancake until bubbles have formed and broken across entire surface and underside is golden brown, 4–5 minutes. Using 2 spatulas (or sliding onto a flat plate before inverting back into skillet), flip pancake. Continue to cook until lightly browned underneath, about 1 minute.
Transfer pancake to a plate, then repeat with remaining batter. Serve pancakes topped with sliced fruit and syrup.
